critiques.finding: When pathenrollment1 table exists but returns no active row, fetchCurrentPathEnrollment returns EMPTY_ENROLLMENT from the table path without consulting onboarding_data fallback.
critiques.alternative: Merge table miss with deriveFromOnboardingData (as microCommitmentsApi does for schema-missing only) when pathenrollment1 schema lands.

critiques.finding: DashboardMain DashboardSlot and DashboardCurrentPathCard both emit data-bubble-id ai_RNbBHXSf, yielding duplicate selectors on the right-column current-path region.
critiques.alternative: Use a transparent slot wrapper without data-bubble-id (left-column ai_RNbBHXRX pattern) or drop the inner card root marker and rely on the slot boundary.
